name: claude-usage-meter
description: Claude Code statusline usage meter with rate-limit forecasts.
author: preyam2002

scripts.validate:claude: if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then claude plugin validate . && claude plugin validate plugins/claude-usage-meter; else echo "Skipping Claude plugin validation: claude CLI not found"; fi
scripts.validate: npm test && npm run validate:claude && npm run validate:codex && npm run pack:dry-run
